narrative: US-Iran tensions escalate over the weekend, setting up a risk-off environment for the Tokyo open, with EUR/USD likely to weaken from Friday's close of 1.1723 and USD/JPY may extend gains on safe-haven USD bid from Friday's close of 157.03. The bull steepener yield curve regime and Trump's comments on European autos also weigh on market sentiment. AUD/USD, which closed Friday at 0.7208, may be supported by commodity prices, while GBP/USD, which closed Friday at 1.3575, may be influenced by the BoE's upcoming meeting.
